titleStmt.title: SII 4.283: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 283. (A.R. No. 54 of 1889). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Every line of the inscription begins with the symbol of ananusvāra.śubhamastu . svasti . śrīvijayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1436 saṁdu mēle naḍava bhāvasaṁvatsarada Āṣāḍa śu 15 gu lū śrīmanmahārājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrakruṣṇadēvamahārāyarū pratāparudragajapatiya mēle daṁḍu bijeyamāḍi pratāparudragajapatiyanu koṁḍavī
ḍapariyaṁtaralū muṟiyaliṟidu Udayagiridu¨rgavanu tegadukoṁḍu digvijayavanū māḍi vijayanagarade rājadhānige tirigi bijayamāḍutā tiruveṁ
gaḷanāthadēvara daruśanakke cittesidāga kruṣṇadēvamahārāyara dēviyaru cinnājidēviyaru tiruveṁgaḷanāthadēvarige muttu 111 nāyakamāṇike 1 ka pace 2
vajra 4 sahā tūka ga 21 kaṁ sama¨rpisi padakada kaṁṭhamāle 1 ta(ṁ)mma Ubhayavāgi dēvara Amrutapaḍi nayivēdyake di 1 kaṁ harivāṇa 5 A(ṁ)kkāḷemaṁḍe 1
Appapaḍi 1 yivanū sōpaskarasahitavāgi naivēdyavanū sama¨rpisuva mariyādege kaṭaḷeya māḍi tathātithimanvādipu(ṁ)ṇyakāladali dhāreya neṟadu
koṭa toṁḍamaṁḍalada muḍiyūra grāma 1 . yī grāmada rokka dhānya yēnuṁṭādanū Agumāḍikoṁḍu di 1 kaṁ harivāṇa 5 Akkāḷemaṁḍe 1 Appa
paḍi 1 yī mariyādeyali Āceṁdrā¨rkkastāyiyāgi dinaṁpratiyalū tappade naḍasi baraluḷavaru . viṭavanviḷukkāḍu nālkaloṁdu pālu prasā
da harivāṇa . 1 Akkāḷimaṁḍe Ø Appaprasāda 13 Ivaroḷage tirupaṇipiḷege prasāda nāḷi hōgalāgi niṁthanū tirupaṇipiḷavaśavāgi naṁma dha¨rmavāgi satrada brāhmaṇa
bhōjanakke naḍasuvahāge kaṭaḷeya māḍi koṭa dha¨rmaśāsana . yī dha¨rmakke Ārobbaru tappidarū taṁma taṁdetāyigaḷanū gōbrahmaranū vāra
ṇāśiyalli koṁda pāpakke hōgaluḷavaru . dānapālanayō¨rmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāt sva¨rgamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ [. 1*]
svadattād dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt [. 2*] svadattāṁ paradattāṁ
vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiṁ [. 3*]
Digital edition of SII 4.283 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
